security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost; font-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Personal financial tracker with tax workspace
bundle.longDescription: Import bank transactions from OFX/QFX/CSV files, categorize with auto-rules, and track business expenses against T2125/TP-80 tax line items with GST/QST ITC/ITR computation.
